description_long: This is a dark brown, rounded leather handbag with a prominent braided trim running along its edge, giving it a handcrafted and rustic appearance. The front panel features an embossed Celtic-inspired pattern, adding a touch of artistry and cultural flair. The bag has a single, sturdy strap attached at the top, suitable for carrying by hand or possibly over the wrist. The sides are plain, with the braided edge continuing seamlessly around the perimeter. The back of the bag is unadorned, showcasing the natural texture of the leather. The overall construction suggests durability and a focus on both function and decorative detail.
description: A dark brown, rounded leather handbag with braided trim and an embossed Celtic pattern on the front. It features a single top strap and a rustic, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick braided trim and the depth of the bag, with the strap extending upward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the embossed Celtic pattern and the central placement of the strap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the braided trim and strap visible.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a plain leather surface with the braided trim and strap attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle, non-adjustable, attached at the top center with stitched ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure, likely secured by tucking the flap under the strap or with an internal fastener.
attribute_decorative_elements: Braided trim around the edge and embossed Celtic pattern on the front panel.
attribute_pattern: Embossed Celtic pattern on the front; otherwise, plain leather.
